speaker: MATT
raw_text: Exactly. And also, if you donate to 826LA at the end of the show today we'll read off some of the messages you guys wrote as part of donations, at the end of the show, so we'll give you personal thanks for that at the end of... of today. So that's be cool. Also, I'm wearing a shirt. You notice it's grey-ish colored, this is our second run of the first-- And I say first, because there's hopefully more to come soon-- Critical Role shirt. You guys keep asking for it, we finally set up a Teespring. It'll only be up for the next two weeks, and we're trying to hit certain goals, so that if we manage to hit a thousand tees sold, we're going to go ahead and do another full cast Q&A. If we can all find any that we're available for.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! 826LA is a non-profit tutoring program for kids K through 12th grade. And they're really big on creative writing and storytelling, and they also have a storefront, the Time Travel Mart, in--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Echo Park

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Echo Park! Thank-you. And Mar Vista. There's also one in Mar Vista, and there might be an 826 in your city, I know there's one in Seattle, and Chicago, and New York. So look them up, they're awesome, and yes. They do great work. And you can also tutor for them! You should volunteer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which is also great!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Volunteer to be a tutor for 826.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tutor to teach them to write modules for D&D.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Think you're smart, huh? Think you're smart?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think you're smart?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Think you're smart? Can you teach a 5th grader?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So. As a quick overview as to where we were, the party essentially was given a quest from the capital city of Emon to find the missing folk hero Lady Kima of Vord, a halfling paladin, very well known, who had gone missing while on a pilgrimage vision quest over the past year. She had been missing for a number of weeks, nearly months at this point, and you were sent to the dwarven city of Kraghammer to find and bring her back safely. After going to the city, you discover that she had delved into the mines, seeking some sort of extremely dark evil that was seated somewhere deep beneath Kraghammer proper. In searching for her, you managed to find your way through the mines into the entrance passage into the Underdark. The Underdark which is a very scary place. You've encountered a number of subterranean beasts and creatures, some of which are unnaturally mutated or altered by some sort of magic you cannot place. Upon going through these caverns, a few battles with duergar, the ashen-skinned evil subterranean dwarves-- further subterranean dwarves, I guess you'd say, and encountered your first mind flayers, illithids, which seem to have allied, strangely, with the duergar. Normally enemies by nature, they're working together under what you discovered in sense is a common enemy referred to as K'Varn. Nothing really is known of K'Varn, other than it has a great power and has united these two forces for some nefarious purpose. Apparently these abominations, and these strange mutations you've encountered, these experiments, also seem to have been created by K'Varn, though no one knows quite why or how. As you traversed down, you managed to... befriend a arcanist mind flayer that was cast out from the colony, named Clarota, who has aided you under the intent that you would help him free his people of the slavery of K'Varn and release the mind flayers to their own normal state of mind. And you've made your way to the duergar fortress, Emberhold, found and released Lady Kima, who underwent many, many weeks of torturous experiences to come through still firm of mind and ready to kick some ass. Through a very painful battle in the Emberhold, you managed to pull your party out, only a few of them turned to stone, and with a foot burned off. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So I'm excited about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tim Drake!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That game looks boring.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, pfft! Who's going to touch it? Yeah... that was a huge honor, so I'm really excited about that. So if anyone has anything else? Those are our announcements for this evening. We can hop on in. Also, those that the t-shirts, I think it just got set up in the chat room that if you scroll all the way to the bottom there will be a button for you to find the t-shirts, so even easier way of getting to them. Check it out. Anyway! So, into the game. Let me go ahead and get the music going because I think that's a required aspect of this as far as I'm concerned.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm always nervous in the first five minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You remember how to play?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Here we go.

speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So I'm excited about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tim Drake!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That game looks boring.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, pfft! Who's going to touch it? Yeah... that was a huge honor, so I'm really excited about that. So if anyone has anything else? Those are our announcements for this evening. We can hop on in. Also, those that the t-shirts, I think it just got set up in the chat room that if you scroll all the way to the bottom there will be a button for you to find the t-shirts, so even easier way of getting to them. Check it out. Anyway! So, into the game. Let me go ahead and get the music going because I think that's a required aspect of this as far as I'm concerned.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm always nervous in the first five minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You remember how to play?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Here we go.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would say for the two that didn't act this turn, you guys can have advantage on the initiative roll because you guys have been holding your actions. So Tiberius, you can also have advantage on your initiative roll, since you guys were holding off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he rolled an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket falls to the ground with this horrible (bear groan) sound, digging his nose into the actual dirt to try and find a way to escape this piercing mental agony, this psychic damage...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty shitty, you guys. It sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you guys take 22 points of psychic damage, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. Trinket's about to die again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who's all stunned?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Laura, twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Bear and Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pike also.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DM, I'm throwing a dagger at the queen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Now we roll initiative, folks, because stuff has begun.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (fumbling) Can I do something right before that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, essentially this triggers the combat now. This was an immediate occurrence. Now we're going into initiative order.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Now, by my saying that, do I get into the initiative order, or does my action come out, my decision come out before?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, wow, four rounds. Go for an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 21 over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah everyone's in. All right, cool. So, top of the round. Percy, you're up first.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We need earth elemental stats if you know where they are, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, did you not print them out? Monster Manual.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Monster Manual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here we go. (funny accent) See, this comes in handy more often than you'd think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. But while we're looking that up, I'm basically going to pull my gun, I'm going to fire four times into the face of that awful, awful screaming bastard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Of the, the mind flayer over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the mind flayer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you whip around, he's there in your face, go ahead and make-- You're using your action surge to fire two additional times, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (singing) Mysterious fireball, ice dagger source. Okay. You come to consciousness, in extreme pain as your entire body is immersed briefly in flame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, to her and everyone-- Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: In a five-foot radius. So yeah...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: And that guy's like right next to her, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Hey, Matt. How much damage did I take?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What was the damage on the fireball?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 31? 31 points of fire damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Cool, and that's four points of damage to both of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you dead?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To both of them? All right. Well, for one, four damage is enough, as the shards of ice from the back of Ulara's torso explode into this spray of jagged ice chunks. It pierces continuously the right side of this dwarf, who then falls to the ground, grasping at his wounds and trying to stand to his feet before falling over unconscious right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: And I have Greater Invisibility, so I'm still invisible and I just peek back behind the rock.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So Grog, as the flames die down, you look over and watch Scanlan rush up and completely, as far as you know, disintegrate the duergar queen who took you and has been torturing you these past few days--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Bard ass!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Get the hell out of there (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I get my bonus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to give inspiration to Grog because he needs it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so, as you turn the corner, you fire once, take another step forward, go (click) click over the next barrel, fire a second time. The duergar which was attacking you-- you see part of it's still burnt from the fireball which was tossed the first round-- he's frustrated and angry that you caused him to somehow lower his guard when he attacked you last.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shoot her!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shoot him, Percy!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to take a step towards-- who's buggering Scanlan over there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A duergar.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's a duergar? I'm just going to take a shot at him really quick.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit me!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not going to hit you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hard to see him right now; there's a big tent in the way, if you want to take a step forward, continue moving.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll take a step forward, I'm going to continue moving, this is going to be a running shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, as you turn, pull your gun off to the side, (explosion) offhand fire--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18 does hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't like guns.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's-- don't go anywhere. That's nine damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine damage, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to shoot again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. That also hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Bad News.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Eight damage. Bad News has not come out yet! This is just my little Pepperbox.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, between the two of you, over the next few seconds or so, you pick the next one and with that remaining push, you force the rest of the bands off. Grog, you make your way up to your feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to move on to the next one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And a 25 on my lock pick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you get a second band. You rolled a 25? And Marisha, do you want to go ahead and make an athletics check as well? Or that would be a strength check for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For your form, your elemental form, to try and pull the bands off of Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unless you want to do something else.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to recommend to Pike that she do a bit of healing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Pike! Can you heal Trinket. He's really almost dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is Pike okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pike comes over and spends a 3rd-level healing spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I failed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You failed what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Life. Oh wow! Yeah, you did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Trinket heals 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vax is moving to the next band. That's a 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I got a 25, does that not help?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys can short rest if you want to heal yourselves with your hit dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do you see, Kima?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) "This was one of my companions."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) Oh, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, judging by the scars across his body, he had already been made a thrall of one of the illithid. Most likely the one that we finished back there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Killed her friend?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was already a thrall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There wasn't much to really bring him back at this point, I fear."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that what they would've done to Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And as you guys all look at Grog now, you can see him, he has hundreds upon hundreds of small scars across his body: fresh wounds that have just barely sealed. It looks like they've done a number on him with a bunch of small blades, hooks, razors-- it's hard to tell. But he is coated with small cuts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's been interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You look really manly now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Have we done some healing? Has healing been done?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Also, t-shirts on sale, as of today. They are a limited run for two weeks. We are trying to get to our goal of 1,000 before that's done, hopefully. So you can just scroll down to the bottom of the Twitch page; you'll find a button there that will get you to that shop. So go for it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everyone. We've been sufficiently rested. First, we're going to say thank you and welcome to all our new viewers. Welcome to Critical Role and all of its chaos: A bunch of voice actors playing Dungeons & Dragons. I also want to congratulate the first winner of our TableTop promo kit this evening, Zargross won. Well done. We'll be giving out another one at 2,750. So 2,750 subscribers and someone else in the chat room will win another promo kit. So that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We will be here every week, so subscribe.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so the 826 donation's working again. Yay! Let us begin. So after an evening's rest, taking your respective turns keeping watch, all of you come to consciousness once more. Clarota anxiously sits at the edge of the camping facility, looking deeper into the tunnel ahead, keeping his eyes peeled in the darkness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We will be here every week, so subscribe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, t-shirts on sale, as of today. They are a limited run for two weeks. We are trying to get to our goal of 1,000 before that's done, hopefully. So you can just scroll down to the bottom of the Twitch page; you'll find a button there that will get you to that shop. So go for it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Also, the PayPal is working again, for donations.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About a half an hour further down this tunnel, both Vax and Vex simultaneously notice a part of the wall to the left that is actually visibly cracked and what appears to be almost a narrow passage that juts off to the left. However, there is a large boulder, solid stone, that is wedged into this. Apparently blocking the passage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Sweet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you still want more of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll take a few.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I go Hong Kong Phooey on the wall of crystals with my axe and I just (snarling).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: When the noise dies down, you gather shards and pieces. Probably enough to fill a small bucket. You can indeed fill your small bucket, should you have one. That is your prerogative, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't, but I have a fancy robe. And I put it in there and I bundle it up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay! If you had a stick, you could be a crystal hobo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A fancy bundle of crystals.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We also have a fancy Bag of Holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's in the bag. It's all in the bag.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You lose your balance over the boulder as it's now shoved off of its axis.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 26? On the strength check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On the strength check? So as you guys are explaining, "This seems to be a fairly--" You don't even get to finish your sentence before Grog goes-- grabs the boulder, gets underneath and, lifting with the knees, Atlas-style. Puts the weight on the back and (groans)--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm singing to help him, to inspire him. "(singing) Push it, push it real good! Push it, push it real good!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Push it, push it real good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With a resounding (scraping sound) scraping sound and a large crack, some of the rocks that it's wedged in break off and tumble to the sides, and you get the boulder free and you're now clutching it on top of you. And it's very, very heavy.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh! I use my Mage Hand and I push it, too.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, looking at it, you notice that they have been here for at least 200 years. Two of the bodies are male humans. There are two dwarven bodies: one male, one's female.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You said they're covered in webs?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are webs on them, but the webs themselves are small, natural spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Small, natural. So not Bilbo Baggins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you do notice that each one of their skulls has a giant hole bored into the bone itself. Different places in the skull.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to start searching all of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyone else want to do anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to make my way, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I thought we were all following.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The rest of you make your way in one by one. It's a small room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm staying outside with Trinket and Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys hang out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like Pike wouldn't want us to do too much damage to these bodies. I just feel like she wouldn't want us to disturb them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't give a shit about these bodies. I care about what they are carrying.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It effectively acts as a Shield spell once per day. Once per short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Didn't he say to bring back some stuff from the Underdark?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes. This is what we need.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who's he?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That name sounds familiar, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, your magic guy said to bring back some magic stuff from the Underdark.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From the Value of Valor. Tremaine? Was that his name?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: And that's what this is. Let me take it and do-- I'll use that arcana check on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the actual amulet itself does have a magical essence to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I think this will do for our friend back up on the surface. Or under surface.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Amulet of the Shield.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (mumbling) This protective amulet of the shield ... adding plus five to your AC against that attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What does it do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It protects you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Apparently. As you guys head back into the cavern, you move around the boulder that Grog had moved from the side crevice. And as you continue for about another 20 or 30 minutes, some of you begin to pick up what sounds like the distant lapping of waves against a shore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Too late. Let's just keep moving, all right? Let's just keep moving.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we need to roll a brother sister contest die.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we should just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I grab her by the ear and say, "That's mine. That's mine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ow ow! Come on. I need it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Squeezing her earlobe really hard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you two roll. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit. (yelling) Aha! It's mine, it's mine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Sibling justice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Persuasion versus persuasion? Is this what this was?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They played arm punch until one caved.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) It's mine, it's mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what does it do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not fucking-- Figure it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll just add a bunch of stuff to my stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You keep talking over each other.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you just having party arguments right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Clarota, as you look over, is gliding into the cavern. It's the closest thing you can imagine seeing a mind flayer to smiling. He's looking about and in response to you, a few moments later, he says, "We're near home."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll finish my description. (chuckles) So there's this lake circling this large island across the way. You also see on this side of the shore, central, there is a large stone bridge that arches over the lake and makes landfall about roughly 200 feet on the other side, at the very, very tip closest to you of this island. It's about 15 feet wide this bridge, maybe 20 feet, and is an immediate walkway onto this island across. You can see just faintly on the edge of this island a glowing bioluminescent fungal forest that covers a large portion of this island's top side. The edges of it, you can see, rise up into cliffs that have eroded over time and are rather stark in places.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Plants! Look, living things!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Clarota? Is this in any way dangerous?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So Keyleth's form jumps into the air, this thin, lithe half elven figure that then turns into this giant shark beast that (splash sound) into the water underneath. A few moments later, Grog jumps in. Big splashing sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you two. As you all walk up to the edge of the shore line and you're inspecting the water, feeling for it. You look over and on the far left side of the shore, you can see just below the waterline what looks like... a sunken boat. Or two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't see shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What? There's a sunken boat in the lake.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Really, should I go get it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Down here? Clarota, why? Why boats?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Clarota gives you a look. "I do not know. Many things wander these tunnels beyond my kin. We are but one of its denizens."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who's a good swimmer?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Me! I'm actually a really good swimmer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lady Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's a very good swimmer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You guys want to take a look?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I run over to the edge of the water and I do a swan dive and as I swan dive, I turn into a shark in the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I run to the water, as well, and I fucking cannonball. (all laugh)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You take a while with it. It takes a little bit longer than you anticipated, but you have your general tools with you. You hammer away. About an hour and a half to two hours later, you're sweating, your muscles are sore, but you feel like you've managed to get the hole for the most part patched. Now it's just to test its buoyancy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Yes, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You use this bardic inspiration specifically for stuff like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I do. Yes, I will inspire you. I don't know what to sing. What's a boat song?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) The love boat...

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How does it start?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not feeling very inspired.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing hesitantly) Something exciting's waiting for you? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I'm on a boat, motherfucker! I'm on a motherfucking boat. (speaking) That's all I got.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel inspired.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll give you a d6 for that. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Sailing...

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Takes me away to where I've always heard it go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's worth a d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If it wasn't Vax singing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right. What do I add to the modifier, by the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You add whatever your tinkering bonus is, which should be your dex.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My dex modifier, thanks. Thank god. 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13 total?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, 13 total.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I can do that. All right, starting here with Vorath. "Another donation this week to this amazing cause. You guys are hours of entertainment every time. Also Orion, Tiberius ordering donuts is not poppycock." (laughs) Thank you so much. All right, we have Nadoprime. "I just discovered this show a week ago I'm now a subscriber?" Aw. "And I'm pledging to give five dollars every week that I watch." Well, thank you so much, Nadoprime! It's great. We've got Lipoolflinger. "This is awesome. High fives all around. Please keep going." We shall! This isn't ending any time soon. Unwriteable, gave us a $70 donation. Thank you, Unwriteable. That's amazing. Panobo! "Hi from Mexico, gran juego, viva el D&D." There we go. I've been talking all night, sorry. Thank you so much. G1BigDaddyHef. "My weekly donation for a fantastic charity. Always look forward to Critical Role stream Thursdays. T-shirt reserved. Can't wait." You guys are awesome. Huric. "Hi, there. Not sure if anyone will get in trouble if you read this out loud, but this is what the shirt I put on redbubble made so far. I made a promise that what I make from the shirt goes to the charity. Love what y'all do." Oh, it's Matt Abernathy! Thank you so much! Great designs, too. Keep them coming. We're hoping to do some stuff with fan designs in the near future, so we'll let you guys know. EasyShadow. "Hey guys, started watching two weeks ago, and I'm hooked! Got my paycheck, so I went ahead and subbed, bought the shirt, and am now donating. Keep it up, guys. Thanks. Oh, and #SaveGrog." Thank you, EasyShadow. That's awesome

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's the undead!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Indeed, the overlord has come!

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Hey, guys! (all yay, cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: What's up, Zac?

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Good job tonight, everybody. So, I just want to do one more shout-out to those t-shirts. Scroll down, buy some shirts. We have two weeks to sell 1,000 of them. This, to be totally honest, is to prove to the powers that be that Twitch is a viable resource for income (laughing weakly), woo!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: And good entertainment, good entertainment.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Great entertainment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We all know this is going to grow, so we're just getting ahead of the game.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Much like Scanlan's penis.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Enough with the dick jokes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: So, do you guys want to read all these messages?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I'd love to!

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: So, we had quite a few donations tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We did?

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: We did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes and, we broke PayPal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I can charge through these real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: I might let you, yeah. Phew!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I can do that. All right, starting here with Vorath. "Another donation this week to this amazing cause. You guys are hours of entertainment every time.
